/usr/lib/ccache/g++ -g CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/backend/Movie.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/backend/MovieManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/backend/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/database/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/screens/LoginScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/screens/SignupScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/screens/DashboardScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/screens/AdminScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MovieGUI.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o MovieGUI  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so -lsqlite3
